concepts.title: Dirichlet series basics
concepts.blurb: Series Σ a_n n^{-s} have abscissas of convergence and analytic continuation questions.

concepts.title: Euler products and multiplicativity
concepts.blurb: Multiplicative coefficients factor series over primes and encode arithmetic independence.

concepts.title: Dirichlet characters and L-series
concepts.blurb: Characters twist Euler products and prove arithmetic distribution results.

concepts.title: Mellin transform and the gamma integral
concepts.blurb: The Mellin transform $\int_0^\infty f(x) x^{s-1}\,dx$ turns a Dirichlet series into an integral against a theta-like kernel, the bridge Riemann uses for analytic continuation.

concepts.title: Perron's formula
concepts.blurb: A contour integral of $D(s) x^s/s$ recovers the summatory function $\sum_{n\le x} a_n$ from the Dirichlet series, turning coefficient asymptotics into residue calculations.
